rows.label: qev051305_MSG0001
rows.name:
How did it go? Were you
able to acquire the key?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051305_MSG0002
rows.name:
The Celeste Three's vault is right
here. Now all we need to do is
open the door with the keys.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051305_MSG0003
rows.name:
Master is waiting. Complete
your mission quickly.[ST:wait ]
